raw.message: Block Crush! Free to Play Now

hook.summary: Rapid-fire block placement and satisfying destruction of wooden tiles.
hook.visual_action: Wooden blocks are dragged into a grid, completing rows and columns which then shatter into splinters.

scene_flow: Fast-paced gameplay showing multiple wooden blocks being placed into a grid.
Consecutive line clears causing blocks to explode into wooden shards with satisfying sound effects.
Continuous high-speed gameplay showcasing various block shapes and strategic placements.
Final transition to the 'Block Crush' game logo on a wooden texture.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle enthusiasts who enjoy satisfying, tactile mechanics and minimalist wooden aesthetics.
